description: Use this API to read a Machine Impedance Data File and add the data specified in it to the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = mcre(status, ifile)

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: An array of two elements specifying options. (input).

parameters.name: ifile
parameters.description: Name of machine impedance data file. (input; no default allowed).

status.description: new machine status option (0 by default).
set from STAT field on input record.
set from status of other machines at the bus.
option for treatment of machines with no data record specified and other machines at the bus with record specified (0 by default).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
